certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

eu_ai_act.risk_rationale: Process involves AI interaction with users
requirements: Inform users they are interacting with AI

gaps: No explicit AI risk assessment or impact assessment process
Missing transparency/explainability controls for AI-driven decisions
Insufficient data governance and accountability mechanisms for the hybrid agent
No continuous improvement loop defined for AI performance
recommendations: Implement ISO 42001-aligned AI risk and impact assessments integrated with PPAP escalations
Add decision logging and human oversight audit trails for explainability
Define AI-specific objectives, resources, and performance metrics under an AI management system

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: limited. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: No explicit AI risk assessment or impact assessment process
GDPR: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
